title: Jobs report, retail sales and wage data among economic releases due Friday
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The jobs report, retail sales, and wage data are key economic releases scheduled for Friday. Retail sales are expected to decline, and job openings remain high.
excerpt: The jobs report, retail sales, and wage data are key economic releases scheduled for Friday. Retail sales are expected to decline, and job openings remain high. Wage growth is also a focus.
